Hotel Name: DoubleTree by Hilton Sharm El Sheikh Sharm Bay
Description:
Surrounded by palm trees, just 5.6 mi from Sharm El Sheikh Airport, DoubleTree by Hilton Sharks Bay Resort features private beach, family entertainment and a range of leisure activities and water sports.

All rooms are feature a private balcony. It includes a flat-screen TV and a fridge. The bathroom is fitted with a bath and a bathrobe.

DoubleTree by Hilton Sharks Bay Resort features 7 outdoor pools, with plenty of space to relax around the terrace. Guests can keep up with their fitness routines using the high-tech gym facilities, followed by a massage with views of the Red Sea.

The Red Sea coast can be explored with the guidance of the onsite professional diving center. Children will be kept entertained at the kid’s club, their shaded pool area and entertainment from the animation team.

The resort offers a variety of cuisines from 13 restaurant and bars. Located in Sharm El-Sheikh, this hotel is located within Naama Bay. It has a private beach, 5 swimming pools, and offers air-conditioned rooms with satellite TV.

Rooms at the Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh have tiled floors and elegant furnishings. They come equipped with a mini-bar, as well as tea and coffee making facilities. Some rooms feature balconies with panoramic views.

The property has two wings "Beach Wing" located at the side of the beach and "Palm Wing" located on the other side across the road.

The Novotel has 3 restaurants that serve a variety of regional and international cuisine. Al Dente offers Italian fare and views of the Red Sea. The Bedu Bar provides live entertainment.

Guests can enjoy a relaxing massage, or visit the fitness center. The hotel also has a games room with table tennis, and a children’s playground.

Novotel Sharm El-Sheikh is less than 6.2 mi from Sharm el-Sheikh International Airport. JAZ Neo Sharks Bay is 4 stars all-inclusive hotel in one of the world’s most renowned destinations, Sharm El sheikh. Ideal for practical travelers looking for a comfortable getaway.

At this relaxed accommodations, each room features a breezy balcony or terrace, with charming views of the pool and garden. Our two swimming pools are ideally designed to accommodate guests who wish to either enjoy a laid-back tan or take a refreshing dip.

At JAZ Neo Sharks Bay resort, our guests are entitled only for beach use at Jaz Belvedere resort, all other outlets & services are not permitted for use, A free shuttle bus with a schedule to the beach is available for our guests.

Along with the wide range of facilities and impeccable services, guests will savor an exquisite dining experience through a culinary journey like no other.

JAZ Neo Sharks Bay is in the heart of the vibrant diving scene in Sharm El-Sheikh, while being only a minute away from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport. And if you’re looking for shopping and nightlife, the renowned Naama Bay is close by and transportation can be arranged by the hotel. | Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 8.5 for a two-person trip. | Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap | We have an instant answer to most questions | Children of all ages are welcome. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search.

Located right on Montaza Beach, this 5 star resort combines an impressive range of features and facilities. It features a private beach, 2 pools, a kids' pool and club. Jaz Belvedere is 3.7 mi away from SOHO Square and 8.1 mi away from the International Congress Center.

Styled with touches of traditional Arabian-Moroccan design, the hotel is one of the finest in Sharm El Sheikh. At Belvedere, you can enjoy something very special: warm, individual service,  entertainment programs, and diving.

Activities can be enjoyed at the resort that includes beach tennis, volleyball court and a multi-purpose court. Guests can enjoy water sport facilities, windsurfing, diving, snorkeling, and canoeing with an added charge.

The spa includes reviving treatments, foot-bath, massages, relaxation programs, and beauty services with an added charge.

Nestled along a private beach overlooking the Red Sea, Amphoras Blu Ultra All-Inclusive Hotel offers the perfect blend of relaxation and adventure. The hotel lies just 6.8 mi from Sharm El Sheikh International Airport, 2.7 mi from Naama Bay, and 1.6 mi from Downtown.

Guests can indulge in rich international buffets at the Main Restaurant, or savor Mediterranean flavors at Mare Rosso, an à la carte fish restaurant located at Amphoras Blu. They can also explore three exquisite à la carte venues at the sister property Amphoras Beach, located alongside Amphoras Blu, Bella Vista, where Italian charm meets sea breeze; Red Dragon, serving Asian-inspired creations; and Mermaid, offering the freshest seafood.

Refreshing drinks and imported alcoholic beverages are available around the clock at the Welcome Bar, open 24/7, while the Beach Bar serves seaside treats, including late breakfast and ice cream. For poolside relaxation, the Palma Pool Bar offers imported alcoholic beverages and shisha in a laid-back ambiance.

Guests are welcomed with a fruit basket and cookies upon arrival. They can also enjoy a limited number of complimentary laundry pieces and free access to modern fitness facilities, including a padel court, gym, spinning classes, and CrossFit sessions.

With its perfect balance of relaxation, gastronomy, and recreation, Amphoras Blu promises an unforgettable Red Sea escape for every guest | Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 9.1 for a two-person trip. | Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap | Children over 16 are welcome. | Children 18 and above will be charged as adults at this property. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search.

Located on El Sharm Maya Bay, most popular for its diving spots, Turquoise Beach Hotel is located on the Red Sea shore. It offers a pristine private beach, an indoor and outdoor pool with a sun-lounger terrace.

All the rooms and apartments overlook the garden, sea or pool. Each accommodations is equipped with a satellite TV, a wardrobe and a telephone. The apartment includes a living room with sofa. Some rooms include a balcony or patio.

The hotel’s main restaurant serves three meals daily which is breakfast, lunch and dinner. A buffet-style breakfast is served daily, while à-la-carte specialties are served in the evening. Room service is 24 hours.

Guests willing to take diving lessons can opt for the professional services offered by the diving center at the hotel. Water sports available on site include snorkeling and wind surfing. Relaxing massage treatments can be arranged upon request.

Old Market in Sharm El Sheikh is located within 1640 feet’ walk from Turquoise Beach Hotel. In tropical grounds, this 4-star resort features a diving center with professional instructors on the Red Sea shore. It offers a free beach bus to Um El Seid Gulf.

The lagoon-style outdoor pool of Dive Inn Resort is surrounded by tall palms and charming ponds. After a session with the experienced trainers of the fitness center, guests can enjoy a sauna or a massage.

All rooms at Dive Inn Resort feature a private balcony or terrace overlooking the pool area. Each room includes satellite TV, a spacious wardrobe and a vanity table with mirror.

The main restaurant, which overlooks the pool area, offers a varied dining menu, as well as a buffet. Freshly squeezed juices and sandwiches can be enjoyed by the pool, while the Nagham Nightclub provides Egyptian music and dance.

The lively Naama Bay is just 10 minutes from Dive Inn, while Sharm el-Sheikh Airport is 9 miles away. | Couples in particular like the location – they rated it 8.9 for a two-person trip. | Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap | We have an instant answer to most questions | Children of all ages are welcome. | Children 13 and above will be charged as adults at this property.

Welcoming guests since 1998 , The Arabesque style resort is directly overlooking the turquoise water of Naama Bay with a wide panoramic view over the whole bay.

With authentic and simply decorated rooms , heated swimming pool , exceptional culinary experience , 5 beaches and a variety of water sports and activities , Mövenpick Resort Sharm El Sheikh Naama Bay is your perfect choice for a relaxing hassle free vacation.

Oriental and Egyptian cuisine is offered at the El Kababgy Restaurant while La Brise serves Italian food. Indian food is served at the Rangoli. Liwa Restaurant serves international dishes from the terrace with Red Sea views.

Sharm Mövenpick guests can enjoy a relaxing massage, or visit the fitness center which includes cardiovascular equipment. There is also a tennis court and a hot tub. Nearby leisure activities include diving, snorkeling and horse riding. Horse lovers find a riding paradise within the resort with breathtaking views over a desert and sea landscape with offers of various trips to the beach and to the desert for beginners and experienced riders.

Mövenpick Sharm El-Sheikh is conveniently located a 10-minute drive from both Sharm El-Sheikh International Airport and the city center. Tucked along the shores of Sharm El Sheikh, just 6.8 mi from the airport and 15 minutes from Naama Bay, Amphoras Beach offers a truly immersive Ultra All-Inclusive escape. With 484 elegant rooms and breathtaking views of the Red Sea, the resort is a favorite among snorkelers and divers thanks to its vibrant coral reefs. Six swimming pools and a peaceful sandy beach area provide the perfect backdrop for relaxation. 

From sunrise to late night, you can enjoy an abundance of culinary experiences. Daily buffets at Amphoras Restaurant are complemented by unlimited à la carte dinners at Bella Vista, Red Dragon, and Mermaid. A complimentary experience at Mare Rosso (Amphoras Blu) or Alexandrina (Amphoras Aqua) adds a special touch once per stay. Throughout the day, nine bars spread across the resort serve a wide selection of premium local and imported beverages including cocktails, wine, beer, fresh juices, soft drinks, and hot beverages. Snacks, ice cream and freshly baked treats are offered at various outlets to keep you satisfied at all hours. Layalina cafe offers a cozy space where you can enjoy complimentary shisha, traditional Egyptian snacks, hot and cold drinks, and local cocktails until the early hours. 

The experience continues with endless activities mini golf, padel, water slides, gym access, and lively entertainment from the animation team. Teens have their own dedicated hangout space with games and PlayStation 5, while adults can enjoy serene evenings across the many lounges and bars. 

With thoughtful extras like complimentary laundry, in-room refreshments, turndown service, and luggage wrapping, Amphoras Beach isn’t just a place to stay, it’s a place to fully unwind, indulge, and feel at home. | We have an instant answer to most questions | Children of all ages are welcome. | To see correct prices and occupancy info, add the number and ages of children in your group to your search. | Cribs and extra beds aren't available at this property. | Guests are required to show a photo identification, documentation showing the age of any children included in the reservation and credit card upon check-in.

Surrounded by large tropical gardens with waterfalls and palm trees, this beach front, 5-star resort on Shark’s Bay offers a private beach, huge lagoon-style pool and a spa. Each room has a private balcony.

Each bright and airy room at the Grand Rotana Resort & Spa is equipped with modern furnishings. They have satellite TV and free tea and coffee facilities. They also feature views of the gardens, the pool or the Red Sea.

Guests can relax in the spa bath and sauna of the Grand Rotana's spa. Tennis courts and a gym equipped with cardio equipment and free weights are also available. The huge outdoor pool is the same size as 3 olympic-size pools.

Grand Rotana’s restaurant, Mezzaluna, offers authentic Italian specialties along with scenic views of the Red Sea. Silk Road offers a combination of Eastern and Western dishes. Exotic cocktails can be enjoyed at the various bars.

Grand Rotana Resort is a 15-minute drive from Sharm El Sheikh airport and Naama Bay. Soho Square is 10 minutes by car.
